summary.description:
Today, more moisture-laden rainfall (up 0.5 mm).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 171 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in cloud levels (up 889 m), rainfall (down 0.1 mm), and inside temperature (up 1.7°C) when compared to today.

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 170.7m lower than yesterday, 13.7m lower than the past week, 888.7m lower than the past month.

The cloud levels for yesterday ranged from 745m to 3580m and averaged 1815.7m, while the past week and month indicated warmer conditions.
cloud levels.summary: A high cloud base will mean mostly sunny conditions.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; the temperature will feel nicely warm and pleasant. Also, pleasant humidity levels. Some rain can be expected, a high cloud base will mean mostly sunny conditions, and bright sunshine will dominate the day. Low pressure may bring unsettled weather.
